message:
feat(web): ActionRegistry-driven overlays and command surfaces

- Overlay stack: improve OverlayProvider/OverlayManager with mobile-aware sizing, capped stack w/ undo toast, consistent z-indexing, and resilient Escape handling.
- ActionRegistry: align default shortcuts to platform conventions (Cmd/Ctrl variants) while keeping power-user alternates; use registry metadata to title overlays.
- Command surfaces: update CommandPalette/AnalysisMenu/SearchOverlay/Settings/Help and related overlays to derive items/shortcuts from ActionRegistry for drift prevention.
- Desktop UI: wire ActionToolbar/AnalysisSidebar/ActionDrawer/FAB to registry formatting; add stable data-testid hooks for e2e.
- Model3DView: add fullscreen shell helper class, overlay-open awareness, and cleaner no-structure handling; include RCSB entry URL helper.
- Hotkey UX: fix blocked-hotkey notification timer cleanup and prevent BottomSheet Escape-close while typing.
